data.title: Sprint SKILL.md Phase 1: terminology rename + non-epic routing
data.description:
Edit plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md Phase 1 section (~lines 69-270):

## Changes
1. Rename "## Phase 1: Initialization & Epic Selection" -> "## Phase 1: Initialization & Primary Ticket Selection"
2. Replace "Validate Epic" section to accept any ticket type (not just type: epic)
3. Add non-epic routing after validation:
   - Bug-typed tickets -> dispatch /dso:fix-bug as sub-skill (SC4)
   - Stories/tasks -> complexity evaluation -> optional /dso:implementation-plan (SC1)
4. Update Preplanning Gate: epics -> preplanning (preserved), non-epics -> skip preplanning -> complexity eval
5. Replace epic-id variable references in Phase 1 with primary-ticket-id (keep literal ticket CLI args unchanged)
6. Add user escalation options in Phase 1: (a) fix-bug for bugs, (b) brainstorm enrich, (c) proceed anyway

## .test-index
Partially remove Task 3 RED markers — terminology and routing tests pass after this task.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Phase 1 header contains "Primary Ticket Selection"
  Verify: grep -q "Primary Ticket Selection" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] fix-bug dispatch for bug-typed tickets present
  Verify: grep -q "fix-bug" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Non-epic routing to complexity evaluation present
  Verify: grep -qi "non-epic\|non.epic" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Preplanning preserved for epics
  Verify: grep -q "dso:preplanning" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
